name: Parmesan Cheddar Grits Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Regular Grits (or long cooking grits)
10 oz Spinach, frozen, chopped and squeezed dry
3 Eggs, lightly beaten with 1/2 cup Milk
Salt and fresh black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Butter a large casserole dish and set aside.
3. In a heavy saucepan, combine the butter, milk, and cream. Heat nearly to a boil.
4. Stir in the grits and cook for 20-25 minutes, stirring as necessary to prevent scorching. Use a non-stick pan if possible.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the spinach, green onions, and grated cheddar cheese.
6. Stir in the eggs whisked with milk. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour into the prepared casserole dish and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden. Serve immediately.
